title: calophysa pilosa
intro: Calophysa pilosa, also known as the hairy calophyllum, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calophysa pilosa include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin infections and gastrointestinal problems.
